race.comment: NONESOSPICY (1) showed plenty of ability early in her campaign and was just fair in her only run last campaign. She bolted in at the trials recently and she's unbeaten at this track and trip. Riordan's claim comes in handy and this looks to set up favourably. Can return with a bang. HEDAWOOD (4) was solid last campaign despite only a maiden victory on debut, tackling Saturday grade in his last two before the break. Pike hops on board for his return which is a good push for his chances as he comes here without a trial. Watch for him late in the race. MISS FINKMEYER (7) bolted in at the trials recently and showed plenty in her last campaign. Should get every chance from the good draw for Fiore and she won't can be right in the finish. RODNEY OH RODNEY (8) won here two back before going to Narrogin last start and winning again. Can sit handy and be in this for a long way. BABY PEARL (2) can play a leading role on resumption.
